humanEffortEstimate.rationale: RTE P3 synthesis required full-fidelity reading of upstream planning artifacts, reconciliation of a sprint-allocation contradiction, dependency and milestone analysis across two sprints, and production of two self-contained coordination artifacts.

frameworkObservations.observation: The invocation context places AB#207 in Sprint 1 and AB#201 in Sprint 2, but current draft P3 planning artifacts still show the reverse allocation.
frameworkObservations.suggestion: Add an explicit reconciliation step in P3 before RTE program-board work so PO and SM artifacts reflect the latest committed sprint allocation.
